items.title: iudam Mens Short Sleeve T-Shirt Graphic Loose Fit Tee Crew Neck Palm Tree Summer Shirts
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: iudam, mens, loose, crew, neck, palm, tree, summer, shirts. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
